q:
Select the set in which the numbers are related in the same way as are the numbers of the following sets.
(NOTE: Operations should be performed on the whole numbers, without breaking down the numbers into its constituent digits. E.g. 13 – Operations on 13 such as adding/deleting/multiplying etc. to 13 can be performed. Breaking down 13 into 1 and 3 and then performing mathematical operations on 1 and 3 is not allowed)
(12, 18, 16)
(45, 35, 25)
Find the ratio of (sin² 22° + sin² 68°) and (cos² 33° + cos² 57°).
How many such pairs of digits are there in the number 5128865365325896572, each of which has as many digits between them (both forward and backward) as they have between them in the number system?
What is described as the movement of large food molecules through the cell membrane into the cell during pinocytosis?
o: Small molecules made by the cell are taken in by fat juice
Helping in the digestion of fat juice enzymes in the body
Providing acidic medium by fat juice

q: P, Q, R, S, T, U and V live on seven different floors of the same building. The lowermost floor is numbered 1, the floor above it is numbered 2, and so on till the topmost floor is numbered 7. Q lives on floor number 2. R lives on the floor immediately above S. T lives on the floor immediately below V's floor. Only three persons live between the floors of T and P. R lives on the topmost floor. Only one person lives between the floors of R and P. On which floor does P live?

Seven friends P, Q, R, S, T, U and V are sitting around a circular table. All are facing the centre of the table. Only R is sitting between Q and S. Only T is sitting between P and V. V is sitting third to the right of Q. V is third to the left of U. Who is sitting to the immediate right of R?

Study the following arrangement carefully and answer the question given below.
3 ^ % 7 2 4 £ 5 V 4 7 @ 8 6 6 6 @ 1 (star)
How many such symbols are there in the above arrangement, each of which is immediately preceded by a number and immediately followed by a number?
A book has 802 pages in total. If the first part of the book has twice as many pages as the second part, then how many pages are there in the first part of the book?
Select the option that correctly represents the relationship shown in the given Venn diagram.
drop: Requires a Venn diagram that cannot be linearized to text

UCK-4, WFO-9, YIS-19, ALW-39, ?

When wet slaked lime dries up, it gets converted into ______, so the main substance of slaked lime is ______.
Which of the following is necessary for protecting the environment, and is also useful for agriculture?
Which of the following is divisible by both 4 and 8?

O, P, Q, R, S, T and U are in a row. Q is immediately to the right of O. T is just two places away from S. S is third to the left of R. P is between Q and R. O is at one of the ends. How many persons are sitting between P and S?
In which of the following years was the Indian Parliament Act passed?

In this question, a statement is followed by two conclusions. Which of the two conclusions is/are true with respect to the statement?
Statement: H ÷ Y ≥ A = N = A / W
Conclusions:
I. H > S
II. A ≥ Y
o: Both conclusions I and II are true
Neither conclusion I nor II is true
